---
title: "Ramon N. Rayas"
description: "Data scientist"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: http://github.com/onalix
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: http://youtube.com/@onalix
---

Start reading my [journal entries](journal.qmd).
